HasPlugin{PluginDescriptor{Name:"airbyte", Kind:"resource", Version:Version{Minor:13}}} -> {false}
HasPlugin{PluginDescriptor{Name:"github", Kind:"resource", Version:Version{Major:5}}} -> {false}
DownloadPlugin{ctx, PluginDescriptor{Name:"terraform-provider", Kind:"resource", Version:Version{Major:1, Patch:2}}} -> {"$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-terraform-provider-v1.0.2", <func(bool)>, nil}
LoadPluginProjectAt{ctx, "$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-terraform-provider-v1.0.2"} -> {nil, "", wrapErrors{msg:"no project file found and no plugin file found", errs:[2]{errorString{s:"no project file found"}, errorString{s:"no plugin file found"}}}}
IsExecutable{ctx, "$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-terraform-provider-v1.0.2/pulumi-resource-terraform-provider"} -> {true, nil}
DownloadPlugin.MarkInstallationDone{PluginDescriptor{Name:"terraform-provider", Kind:"resource", Version:Version{Major:1, Patch:2}}, true} -> {}
RunPackage{ctx, "/project", "$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-terraform-provider-v1.0.2/pulumi-resource-terraform-provider", "airbyte", ParameterizeValue{Name:"airbyte", Version:Version{Minor:13}, Value:[26]{111, 112, 101, 110, 116, 111, 102, 117, 47, 97, 105, 114, 98, 121, 116, 101, 104, 113, 47, 97, 105, 114, 98, 121, 116, 101}}} -> {invariantProvider{path:"$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-terraform-provider-v1.0.2", pkgName:"airbyte"}, nil}
GenerateLocalSDK{ctx, ProjectRuntimeInfo{name:"go"}, "/project", invariantProvider{path:"$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-terraform-provider-v1.0.2", pkgName:"airbyte"}} -> {LinkablePackageDescriptor{Path:"$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-terraform-provider-v1.0.2/sdk-airbyte"}, nil}
RunPackage{ctx, "/project", "$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-terraform-provider-v1.0.2/pulumi-resource-terraform-provider", "github", ParameterizeValue{Name:"github", Version:Version{Major:5}, Value:[28]{111, 112, 101, 110, 116, 111, 102, 117, 47, 105, 110, 116, 101, 103, 114, 97, 116, 105, 111, 110, 115, 47, 103, 105, 116, 104, 117, 98}}} -> {invariantProvider{path:"$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-terraform-provider-v1.0.2", pkgName:"github"}, nil}
GenerateLocalSDK{ctx, ProjectRuntimeInfo{name:"go"}, "/project", invariantProvider{path:"$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-terraform-provider-v1.0.2", pkgName:"github"}} -> {LinkablePackageDescriptor{Path:"$HOME/.pulumi/plugins/resource-terraform-provider-v1.0.2/sdk-github"}, nil}
